CustomObject.description: One row per approver-step for a WorkRequest__c estimate/approval. Field shape intentionally cloned from FeatureToggleApproval__c (StatusPk__c, StepNumber__c, DecisionDateTime__c, DecisionNoteTxt__c, ApproverUserLookup__c) so a future PR can unify both approval surfaces under one generic Approval__c without renames. PR1 of the work-approval queue ships single-step rows (StepNumber__c=1) with a discretionary Auto short-circuit; later PRs add the queue LWC, reports, notifications, and the billing cap.
CustomObject.label: Work Item Approval
